title: Lyra-2 Conditioning Modules

classes.name: T2VCondition
classes.notes: Primary conditioning container for text-to-video. Immutable dataclass.

classes.name: Img2VidWan2pt1ConditionLyra2
classes.notes: Image-to-video extension. broadcast() handles y tensors separately via context_parallel.broadcast.

classes.name: AbstractEmbModel
classes.notes: Base for all embedder models. Managed by GeneralConditioner. summary() prints input_key, param count, trainable flag, dropout_rate.

classes.name: TextAttr
classes.notes: Pass-through text embedder. Skips dropout for mask keys. Output key: crossattn_emb.

classes.name: TextAttrEmptyStringDrop
classes.notes: Like TextAttr but replaces dropped tokens with empty-string UMT5 embeddings (lazy-loaded). Uses keep_mask blend instead of zero-out.

classes.name: ReMapkey
classes.constructor: __init__(input_key: str, output_key: Optional[str]=None, dropout_rate=0.0, dtype: Optional[str]=None)
classes.notes: Remaps a batch key to a (possibly different) output key with optional dtype cast. Used for fps, padding_mask pass-through.

classes.name: GeneralConditioner
classes.notes: _forward iterates embedders, applies random_dropout_input, calls embedder.forward, concatenates along KEY2DIM. get_condition_uncondition sets cond dropout=0, uncond dropout=1. Checks isinstance(TextAttr|TextAttrEmptyStringDrop) for neg-prompt path.

classes.name: Img2VidWan2pt1ConditionerLyra2
classes.notes: Calls super()._forward() then wraps result in Img2VidWan2pt1ConditionLyra2(**output). Concrete conditioner for Lyra-2 i2v.

classes.name: Wan2pt1CLIPEmbLyra2
methods: forward(image_tensor, video_tensor, media_latents, mask, buffer_latents) -> Dict[str, Tensor]
classes.notes: Wraps CLIPModel for visual encoding of conditioning frames. input_key=['last_hist_frame','video','cond_latent','cond_latent_mask','cond_latent_buffer'].

classes.name: CLIPModel
classes.notes: Loads XLMRobertaCLIP + HuggingfaceTokenizer. visual() uses model.visual(use_31_block=True) with torch.amp.autocast.

classes.name: HuggingfaceTokenizer
classes.notes: Wraps HuggingFace AutoTokenizer. clean modes: whitespace, lower, canonicalize.

config_wiring.Lyra2ConditionerConfig: Img2VidWan2pt1ConditionerLyra2 with embedders: text=TextAttrEmptyStringDrop, fps=ReMapkey, padding_mask=ReMapkey, wanclip=Wan2pt1CLIPEmbLyra2

key_flows: GeneralConditioner._forward: for each embedder → random_dropout_input(batch[key]) → embedder.forward() → concat outputs by KEY2DIM
GeneralConditioner.get_condition_uncondition: call forward twice with cond_dropout=0 and uncond_dropout=1
Wan2pt1CLIPEmbLyra2.forward: clip_model.visual(image_tensor) → context_B_L_D; concat [mask, media_latents] → y; return {frame_cond_crossattn_emb_B_L_D, y_B_C_T_H_W}
important_notes: All Condition classes are frozen dataclasses (immutable). DataType is a str-enum used as a type tag. AbstractEmbModel wraps nn.Module for managed dropout. GeneralConditioner manages a registry of AbstractEmbModel instances and dispatches batch inputs; concrete conditioners override forward() to produce typed condition objects. TextAttrEmptyStringDrop uses empty-string UMT5 embeddings for dropout rather than zeros.
